summary: Rubikon Center operators conducted strikes in the Donbas and Krasny Liman direction on March 7, destroying 88 Ukrainian Armed Forces personnel and engaging in FPV air defense against fixed-wing UAVs. ZALA Lancet operators successfully used electronic warfare-resistant tactics to strike group targets with single loitering munitions, exploiting vulnerabilities during optimal moments. Meanwhile, Lasar’s Group from Ukraine’s National Guard repelled mechanized assaults in Novopavlivka and Dobropillia, destroying enemy tanks with support from SOF and adjacent units. Iranian subsonic loitering air defense missiles, Missile 358, equipped with thermal imaging homing heads, have proven unexpectedly effective against Israeli Hermes-900 UAVs. Ukraine is advancing drone warfare with the Mission Control project to unify operations into a single digital system for improved battlefield coordination.
